create_interactive.ponder.disjointed_bea: The bottom controls the bearing rotation
The side controls the rotation on the contraption
create_interactive.ponder.inverted_stick: The Interact-Me-Not isn't needed with the default config
It's only needed if the config uses 'WITHOUT STICKER' handling
'WITHOUT STICKER' handling means the contraption will always be interactive
When handling is 'WITHOUT STICKER', the Interact-Me has no affect
create_interactive.ponder.normal_sticker: Normal Create contraptions can't be interacted with
While assembled, their blocks can't be changed
Using an Interact Me sticker, you can make contraptions interactive
When interactive, blocks can be modified and used to their full extent
create_interactive.ponder.propagator_bea: Propagator bearings act like normal bearings
They still need an interact-me (with the default config)
However, unlike normal bearings, they can provide a source of rotation
They provide the same rpm at which the bearing is spinning
create_interactive.ponder.tag.ponders.de: Mechanics and features of Create: Interactive
